hero.description: The official site of Dr. Khaled Ghattass — an archive of articles, books, and interviews, tracing a lifelong inquiry into philosophy, psychology, and contemporary Arab thought.

loading.marquee: Thinker — Philosopher — Author — Psychoanalyst — Columnist — Professor
loading.marquee_row_1: POLITICAL ANALYST — COMMENTATOR — AUTHOR — COLUMNIST — FORMER AMBASSADOR

stats.bio: Dr. Khaled Ghattass has contributed to Arab intellectual and cultural life for four decades — as a writer, philosopher, and psychoanalyst, and as a university professor with a lasting presence in international media through more than five years of dedicated programming on thought and society.
stats.media: HE HAS APPEARED ON BBC ARABIC, AL JAZEERA, SKY NEWS ARABIA, LBC, MTV, OTV, AL ARABIYA.

hero.description: Four decades in thought, psychoanalysis, philosophy, public writing, and dialogue.

about.entry_1: Dr. Khaled Ghattass is a prominent Arab intellectual, psychotherapist, and philosopher
about.entry_2: An author of books on psychology, philosophy, and society
about.entry_3: A prominent public speaker across the Arab world
about.entry_4: A specialist in psychotherapy and mental health
about.bio_paragraph: For over four decades Dr. Khaled Ghattass has contributed to Arab intellectual and cultural life through a practice that bridges clinical psychotherapy, philosophical inquiry, journalistic writing, and media presence. He has authored hundreds of articles in the Arab and international press, published five books in psychology, philosophy, and society, and participated in hundreds of television and podcast conversations.
